servinfo.title: Headlight High / Low Beam Switching Solenoid Inspection

attention3.ptxt: Headlight high / low beam switching solenoid is an integral part of headlight unit assembly. Replace headlight unit assembly if headlight high / low beam switching solenoid is defective.

s1.ptxt: Make sure that variable shade (1) of headlight high / low beam switching solenoid is in low beam position (2).
Connect battery positive (+) and negative (–) terminals to headlight unit connector (3) as shown.
Check that variable shade is inclined to high beam position (4). If variable shade does not operate, replace headlight unit assembly.
